overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with a glowing umbrella walking through a rainy, neon-lit Night City. The character traverses sidewalks, crosses intersections, and walks past towering skyscrapers with vibrant holographic advertisements in a futuristic cyberpunk environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk next to arterial road

events.description: character turns slightly left to follow the sidewalk curve

agents.ego_description: walking along covered sidewalk next to a multi-lane street, holding a glowing purple umbrella

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians waiting at crosswalk in the distance

entered.detail: tall brutalist concrete building with green neon accent lighting
orange metal railing separating sidewalk from street
elevated highway or building overpass ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-slicked sidewalk beneath an overpass, with a massive concrete building on the left and a multi-lane street on the right. The environment is dimly lit with green neon accents, and a few pedestrians are visible in the distance waiting to cross.

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection with falling rain
crossing the multi-lane street at the pedestrian crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection among other pedestrians holding glowing umbrellas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with black umbrella walking across the crosswalk
pedestrian with glowing yellow umbrella standing at street corner

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines
tall street light illuminating the intersection with white light

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into an open intersection with falling rain, joining a moderate crowd of pedestrians with glowing umbrellas crossing the street. The traffic light remains red as vehicles wait, and the wet asphalt reflects the surrounding city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon signage and food vendors

events.description: passing by a street food cart with green umbrella and steam rising
entering area with intense red neon lighting from building signage

agents.ego_description: walking down the sidewalk past various pedestrians and street vendors while approaching a large neon sign

notable_agents.action: street vendor standing under green umbrella next to food cart

entered.detail: street food vendor cart with green umbrella and steam
large vertical neon sign with red 'kabayan' text
large red hexagonal corporate logo on building facade
digital advertisement screen showing animated content

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a commercial sidewalk lined with neon signs, passing a food vendor with a green umbrella. The environment features intense red neon lighting from a large 'kabayan' sign ahead and various holographic advertisements on the buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon with towering skyscrapers and vertical neon

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers and neon signs
camera continues tilting up to show skyscrapers against the night sky

agents.ego_description: stopping to look up at the towering skyscrapers and neon advertisements overhead

entered.detail: tall building with illuminated glass windows and blue accent lighting
massive vertical red neon sign running up the corner of the building
multiple floating holographic billboards between buildings

segments.scene_description: The character stops and looks up at the towering skyscrapers, revealing a dense urban canyon of glass and neon. The camera pans up a massive vertical red neon sign and floating holographic advertisements against the night sky, showcasing the vertical scale of the cyberpunk city.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian underpass entrance with blue lighting

events.description: camera tilts back down to walking position
crossing street and entering covered pedestrian underpass

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and walking into a covered pedestrian underpass with blue fluorescent lighting

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with blue umbrella entering the underpass ahead

entered.detail: covered walkway entrance with blue fluorescent tube lighting
yellow pedestrian crossing lines on wet asphalt
large screen displaying 'TOUGH MORNING' advertisement above the underpass

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to street level as the character crosses the wet intersection and approaches a pedestrian underpass entrance bathed in blue fluorescent light. The 'kabayan' neon sign is visible on the right as the character enters the covered walkway, transitioning from the open rain to a sheltered corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-drenched urban corridor that transitions from a dim underpass into a vibrant neon intersection before descending into a sheltered walkway. It begins with the character walking along a rain-slicked sidewalk beneath a concrete overpass, where the dim lighting is punctuated by green neon accents. As the character emerges from the cover, the scene opens into a wide intersection filled with falling rain and a crowd of pedestrians with glowing umbrellas crossing the reflective asphalt. The camera then follows the character past a commercial strip of intense red neon signs and holographic advertisements, eventually panning upward to reveal the staggering vertical scale of the surrounding glass skyscrapers. Finally, the view returns to street level as the character crosses the wet road and enters a pedestrian underpass bathed in blue fluorescent light, shifting from the open storm back into a sheltered corridor.
